_doc: Source-bucket glob -> owning-spec path. Longest match wins. A PR changing governed source must also change its owning spec or carry the waiver token with a reason: [no-spec: <reason>]. A bare [no-spec] without a reason is NOT accepted. Grow this map as the tree grows.
_planned: Longest glob match wins. As later waves land, carve out more specific buckets and point them at their owning spec, then add the rule when that wave's spec is written: src/themes/** (+ SCSS theme partials) -> wave-2 spec; src/en/** (EN page detection + CTA routing) -> wave-3 spec. The src/** catch-all below stays; the narrower rules override it for their files.
